PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Carpenter in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that everything was in order and granted the petition upon review of the order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-28-2007 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2007 Continued To Mar-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Michael Guglielmino appearing for executor. Counsel stated the inventory was submitted to the probate referee for appraisal. Court wants to see the transmittal letter to the probate referee. Counsel does not have a copy with him but he will submit a copy to the Court. Matter is continued to 3/28. If something is not done, Court will suspend the executor's powers. Counsel stated this is a small estate. 75% of the assets were distributed outside of probate.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Fox.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-07-2007 Continued To Mar-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2007 Continued To Mar-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mike Guglielmino (Counsel for John Carpenter, Personal Representative); John Carpenter (Personal Representative).

Counsel noted at the outset that a Probate Referee had been appointed on February 13, 2007 to appraise the value of certain stock certificates the existence of which was known but only recently located. On that representation, the Court continued the matter to March 7, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Officer: Stella Pantazis, Judge Pro Tempore; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Jimmy Peralta; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnson.
